definitions.description: Allows you to manipulate date and time values
definitions.subtitle: ={{$parameter["action"]}}

properties.displayName:
More powerful date functionality is available in expressions,
e.g. {{ $now.plus(1, 'week') }}
properties.name: noticeDateTime

options.name: Calculate a Date
options.description: Add or subtract time from a date
options.action: Add or subtract time from a date

options.name: Format a Date
options.description: Convert a date to a different format
options.action: Convert a date to a different format

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value that should be converted

properties.name: dataPropertyName
properties.description: Name of the property to which to write the converted date

properties.name: custom
properties.description: Whether a predefined format should be selected or custom format entered

properties.name: toFormat
properties.description: The format to convert the date to

properties.name: toFormat

options.name: MMMM DD YYYY
options.description: Example: April 09 1986

options.name: Unix Ms Timestamp
options.description: Example: 513388800

properties.description: The format to convert the date to

options.name: fromFormat
options.description: In case the input format is not recognized you can provide the format

options.name: fromTimezone
options.description: The timezone to convert from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

options.name: toTimezone
options.description: The timezone to convert to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The date string or timestamp from which you want to add/subtract time

options.name: Add
options.description: Add time to Date Value

options.name: Subtract
options.description: Subtract time from Date Value

properties.name: duration
properties.description: E.g. enter “10” then select “Days” if you want to add 10 days to Date Value.

properties.name: timeUnit
properties.description: Time unit for Duration parameter above

properties.name: dataPropertyName
properties.description: Name of the output property to which to write the converted date

options.name: fromFormat
options.description: Format for parsing the value as a date. If unrecognized, specify the format for the value.
